import React, { useState } from 'react' import './home.css' // Import images import Rukzak from '../../assets/rukzak.png' import DressMen from '../../assets/dresMenns.png' import { Link } from 'react-router-dom' const Home = () => { const [events] = useState([ { id: 1, image: Rukzak, name: 'Stylish Beckpok', price: '$20.00' }, { id: 2, image: DressMen, name: 'T-short', price: '$20.00', subPrice: '$540.00' } ]) return (

Home

{events.map((event) => (

{event.name}

{event.price}

{event.subPrice &&

{event.subPrice}

}
))}
) } export default Home
